items.title: Stokes and Atkinson back for final Test as nightclub incident findings revealed
items.summary: Ben Stokes will return to captain England for the series-deciding third Test against New Zealand at Trent Bridge with Gus Atkinson also back after both players were cleared of violent conduct following a nightclub incident earlier this month.

items.title: England vs NZ player ratings: Root's class endures as debutants struggle

items.title: Broad: England's Oval hammering shows how much they need Stokes
items.summary: Stuart Broad says England's hammering by New Zealand at The Oval shows how much the team need Ben Stokes and that the captain will be "hurt" knowing that his absence significantly contributed to such a heavy defeat.
